title: Keyword bank row — one term in a per-domain vocabulary TSV
description: One row of a vocabulary/keywords/<domain>.tsv. The file's column order is pinned; the matcher in lib/vocabulary.py reads this format. See LLM_FUNNEL_SPEC.md §3 'The keyword banks'.

term.description: Canonical surface word, lowercase preferred. Matched case-insensitively.

level.description: keyword=literal surface word; concept=controlled head; registry_entry=points at a specific live id.

maps_to.description: The target id / pattern. For set_filter use '<dimension>:<value>' (e.g. 'karyotype:HOM_INV'). For set_id_pattern use a glob ('sites_thin*_v1').

aliases.description: Comma-separated alternates. Matcher queries this column too. Empty cell is fine.

notes.description: Free-form documentation; never used by the matcher.
